title: ICMR NINE Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Young Professional I, II Posts
description: The ICMR National Institute of NCD Epidemiology (ICMR NINE) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Young Professional I and II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation, M.E./M. Tech can apply for the ICMR NINE Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education deta...
